---
title: "Benjamín Hernández-Rodríguez"
image: "ben.jpg"
links:
  - label: ORCiD
    url: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5118-8715"
  - label: Google Scholar
    url: "https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=o7zoz10AAAAJ"
  - label: Bluesky
    url: "https://bsky.app/profile/bhernanr.bsky.social"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/ben-hr"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhernand"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:bhernanr@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## Bio

Hi, I’m Ben! I’m a postdoctoral researcher at the Peter MacCallum Cancer Centre in Melbourne, Australia.  My research is focused on understanding epigenetic plasticity in cancer models. I work on the integration of multi-omics data from patients and cell lines, using state-of-the-art bioinformatic methods in R and Python.

## Education

**Max Planck Institute for Molecular Biomedicine** | Münster, Germany

Ph.D. in Biology | 2023

**National Autonomous University of Mexico** | Cuernavaca, Mexico

B.S. in Genomic Sciences | 2015

## Interests

Gene regulation; Bivalent Chromatin; Epigenetics; Plasticity; 3D genome organisation; Evolution; Data analysis

## Research Experience

Peter MacCallum Cancer Centre | Postdoctoral researcher | March 2025 - Now

Max Planck Institute for Molecular Biomedicine | Bridging postdoctoral fellow | June 2023 - December 2023

Max Planck Institute for Molecular Biomedicine | PhD student | October 2015 - June 2023

Max Planck Institute for Molecular Biomedicine | Undergraduate researcher | September 2014 - May 2015

Stowers Institute for Medical Research | Summer scholar | June 2014 - August 2014

Instituto de Biotecnologia, UNAM | Undergraduate laboratory researcher | September 2012 - May 2014

iGEM UNAM Genomics 2012 | Team member | October 2011 - May 2013
